description: A customer on an 'Enterprise' plan is downgrading and needs to export data from an Enterprise-only feature before they lose access.

nodes.task_description: Process the plan downgrade request, effective at the end of the month.
Inform the customer they will lose access to the 'Advanced Audit Log' feature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the impact of the downgrade.

nodes.task_description: Guide the customer on how to use the data export tool to save their audit log history before the plan change takes effect.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides helpful instructions to prevent data loss for the customer.
